scripts.format: prettier --write .golangci.yml .prettierrc package.json package-lock.json docker-compose.yml README.md AGENTS.md CONTRIBUTING.md docs/architecture.md docs/audit-v1-design.md docs/auth-v1-design.md docs/local-pomerium.md deploy/local-pomerium/README.md deploy/local-pomerium/*.yaml buf.yaml buf.gen.yaml tsconfig.json eslint.config.js sync/sync.js sync/package.json sync/package-lock.json sync/eslint.config.js scripts/local-auth-smoke.mts scripts/local-pomerium-smoke.mts scripts/setup-local-pomerium.mts bruno/local-auth-smoke/bruno.json "bruno/**/*.yml" .github/workflows/ci.yml .github/copilot-instructions.md && npm run proto:format && npm run format:go
scripts.format:check: prettier --check .golangci.yml .prettierrc package.json package-lock.json docker-compose.yml README.md AGENTS.md CONTRIBUTING.md docs/architecture.md docs/audit-v1-design.md docs/auth-v1-design.md docs/local-pomerium.md deploy/local-pomerium/README.md deploy/local-pomerium/*.yaml buf.yaml buf.gen.yaml tsconfig.json eslint.config.js sync/sync.js sync/package.json sync/package-lock.json sync/eslint.config.js scripts/local-auth-smoke.mts scripts/local-pomerium-smoke.mts scripts/setup-local-pomerium.mts bruno/local-auth-smoke/bruno.json "bruno/**/*.yml" .github/workflows/ci.yml .github/copilot-instructions.md
